hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const f=i.tool_input&&i.tool_input.file_path;if(!f)process.exit(0);if(!/\.tsx?$/.test(f))process.exit(0);if(!f.includes('/backend/'))process.exit(0);const cp=require('child_process');try{cp.execSync('npx --no-install prettier --write ' + JSON.stringify(f),{cwd:'/home/rayu/bothsafe/backend',stdio:'pipe'})}catch(e){}try{cp.execSync('npx --no-install eslint --fix ' + JSON.stringify(f),{cwd:'/home/rayu/bothsafe/backend',stdio:'pipe'})}catch(e){}try{cp.execSync('timeout 60 npx --no-install tsc --noEmit --pretty false --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile node_modules/.cache/tsc-hook.tsbuildinfo',{cwd:'/home/rayu/bothsafe/backend',stdio:'pipe'})}catch(e){if(e.stdout)process.stderr.write(e.stdout);if(e.stderr)process.stderr.write(e.stderr);process.exit(2)}})"
hooks.description: Backend: prettier + eslint + tsc on .ts edits

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const f=i.tool_input&&i.tool_input.file_path;if(!f)process.exit(0);if(!/\.(tsx?|jsx?|css)$/.test(f))process.exit(0);if(!f.includes('/frontend/'))process.exit(0);const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('/home/rayu/bothsafe/frontend/package.json'))process.exit(0);const cp=require('child_process');try{cp.execSync('npx --no-install prettier --write ' + JSON.stringify(f),{cwd:'/home/rayu/bothsafe/frontend',stdio:'pipe'})}catch(e){}try{cp.execSync('npx --no-install eslint --fix ' + JSON.stringify(f),{cwd:'/home/rayu/bothsafe/frontend',stdio:'pipe'})}catch(e){}if(/\.tsx?$/.test(f)){try{cp.execSync('timeout 60 npx --no-install tsc --noEmit --pretty false --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile node_modules/.cache/tsc-hook.tsbuildinfo',{cwd:'/home/rayu/bothsafe/frontend',stdio:'pipe'})}catch(e){if(e.stdout)process.stderr.write(e.stdout);if(e.stderr)process.stderr.write(e.stderr);process.exit(2)}}})"
hooks.description: Frontend: prettier + eslint + tsc on .ts/.tsx/.js/.jsx/.css edits (no-op until package.json exists)
